argument.script: async (intermediate) => { const limit = {{ limit }} || 20; const url = 'https://creator.douyin.com/web/api/media/aweme/draft/?aid=1128'; const res = await fetch(url, { method: 'GET', credentials: 'include', headers: { 'Content-Type': 'application/json' } }).then(r => r.json()); const items = (res.aweme_list ?? []).slice(0, limit).map(v => ({ aweme_id: v.aweme_id, title: v.desc, create_time: new Date(v.create_time * 1000).toLocaleString('zh-CN', { timeZone: 'Asia/Tokyo' }) })); return items; }
